title: coleus cyanophyllus
intro: Coleus cyanophyllus, also known as Blue Plectranthus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Coleus cyanophyllus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and soothe digestive issues. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, and is often used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine.
